results.title: Jantar Mantar Protest: CJP calls for nationwide peaceful protests tomorrow, Centre government makes fresh appeal for talks | LIVE Updates
results.description: As tensions rise following police crackdowns at Jantar Mantar, the Cockroach Janta Party calls for nationwide peaceful protests while the Central government appeals for dialogue.

results.title: UN Warns Hunger Crisis Could Worsen Despite Signs of Global Improvement
results.description: Even though there is, the United Nations has released a new food security report, despite these factors continuing to undermine global systems. Noticeable progress: Over the past few years, we have made significant progress in reducing global hunger; however, conflicts and disruptions in the energy market continue to pose challenges.
